page.content: The table presents data on various cytokine levels measured under different inducers. For the inducer "None," the levels recorded are IFN-γ at ˂0.06, IFN-α at ˂3.1, TNF-α at ˂0.13, IL-12 at ˂2.1, and IL-18 at ˂9.2. Under the inducer "HSV-2," the values are IFN-γ at ˂0.08, IFN-α at ˂3.6, TNF-α at ˂0.12, IL-12 at ˂2.2, and IL-18 at ˂8.9. For "EPS2-B3-15 (300 μg·mL−1)," the levels are IFN-γ at 165 ± 19 *,†, IFN-α at 480 ± 76 *,†, TNF-α at 2151 ± 328 *,†, IL-12 at 420 ± 78 *,†, and IL-18 at 140 ± 35 *,†. For "EPS2-B3-72 (300 μg·mL−1)," the cytokine levels are IFN-γ at 115 ± 18 *,†, IFN-α at 116 ± 13 *,†, TNF-α at 1980 ± 101 *,†, IL-12 at 320 ± 49 *,†, and IL-18 at 183 ± 29 *,†. The "EPS1-T14 (300 μg·mL−1)" values are IFN-γ at 58 ± 13 *,†, IFN-α at 45 ± 3 *,†, TNF-α at 610 ± 43 *,†, IL-12 at 128 ± 19 *,†, and IL-18 at 49 ± 3 *,†. For "EPS1-T14 (400 μg·mL−1)," the levels are IFN-γ at 105 ± 28 *,†, IFN-α at 108 ± 25 *,†, TNF-α at 1310 ± 73 *,†, IL-12 at 358 ± 69 *,†, and IL-18 at 86 ± 3 *,†.

page.content: Combining EPS2-B3-15 (300 μg·mL−1) with HSV-2 yields IFN-γ at 79 ± 24, IFN-α at 295 ± 93, TNF-α at 780 ± 98, IL-12 at 115 ± 28, and IL-18 at 84 ± 22. The combination of EPS2-B3-72 (300 μg·mL−1) with HSV-2 shows IFN-γ at 61 ± 9, IFN-α at 42 ± 5, TNF-α at 680 ± 71, IL-12 at 122 ± 17, and IL-18 at 95 ± 13. The combination of EPS1-T14 (300 μg·mL−1) with HSV-2 yields IFN-γ at 27 ± 2, IFN-α at 29 ± 2, TNF-α at 301 ± 28, IL-12 at 57 ± 11, and IL-18 at 23 ± 8. Finally, EPS1-T14 (400 μg·mL−1) combined with HSV-2 results in IFN-γ at 37 ± 2, IFN-α at 26 ± 2, TNF-α at 317 ± 88, IL-12 at 166 ± 20, and IL-18 at 28 ± 10.
